extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports Against Company (criminal 1, tax 10, civil 7, amount ₹255.80 million), Against Directors (criminal 3), Against Promoter (criminal 3), and Against Subsidiaries (criminal 6, tax 19, statutory/regulatory 1, civil 15, amount ₹554.64 million); I counted the criminal, statutory/regulatory, and tax categories separately across the relevant against rows and excluded all By Company and By Subsidiaries rows, as well as promoter/director personal matters from the aggregate amount. The quantified group litigation amount is therefore the stated Against Company plus Against Subsidiaries amounts, ₹810.44 million, converted to ₹81.044 crore; promoter and director amounts were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹2,819.35 million as of June 30, 2022, converted to ₹281.935 crore, rather than a re-sum of line items. The disclosed percentages concern geographic/OEM revenue concentrations, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue; no qualifying customer concentration percentage is provided for a full fiscal year. The source tables use ₹ in million, and the conversion applied is ₹1 crore = ₹10 million, so million amounts were divided by 10.
